prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年东北大学在青海省理科/物理类最低录取位次分别为约2220名、2436名、2193名、2017名、2311名。近五年位次波动区间在2017–2436名之间，整体呈 震荡格局，无明显单边趋势；2025年基准位次为约2311名；东北大学在青海省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2024年均为13人，2025年增至15人，2026年进一步扩至20人，较2025年扩招约33.3%，扩招幅度显著，对竞争格局有重要影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 东北大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；2026年软科中 国大学排名第38位，近年排名稳定在36–39名区间，属国内顶尖工科院校行列；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，主要涉及秦皇岛校区命名争议，无重大负面舆情；2025年曾发生实习安全事故（偏负面），但属偶发事件；抖音热度排名第82位（一般），短视频平台曝光度不高，整体报考关注度平稳；第五轮学科评估中，控 制科学与工程获评A+，计算机科学与技术、冶金工程获评A，机械工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业为2026年高热推荐方向，与东北大学工科优势契合；机械/智能制造、土木建筑等呈分化观 望。青海省2026年高考报名总人数约48000人，较2025年略有增加，物理类考生估算约30720人，竞争小幅加剧；东北大学位于辽 宁沈阳，在青海省招生占比极小（2025年约0.42%），属跨省远距离报考；该校在青海省无本地招生倾斜，考生需结合自身地域偏好权衡；计算机类、机械类、人工智能等招生专业与优势学科高度匹配，对考 生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次2 311名、2026年大幅扩招33.3%（15→20人）、青海省考生总数微增约0.86%、学校声誉中性偏平稳等因素：扩招幅度远超考生增幅，理论上竞争加剧（位次数字增大），但声誉中性 及扩招带来的名额增加对位次有回调作用。经综合权衡，预测2026年最低录取位次约2723名，区间2315–3131名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机科学与技术
- 人工智能（知行英才班）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 机械类（含机械工程、过程装备与控制工程、车辆工程、工业设计）
- 工科试验班（1）（含冶金工程、环境科学、资源循环科学与工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（2）（含矿物加工工程、测绘工程、资源勘查工程、环境工程、安全工程、土木工程）
- 应用物理学
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约2723名，区间2315–3131名。位次在区间低位（约2315名附近）可重点冲刺一档计算机科学与技术、人工智能等王牌专业；位次在区间中段（约2700名附近）以二档机 械类、工科试验班（1）为主力选择；位次在区间高位（约3100名附近）建议以三档专业保底。东北大学控制科学与工程A+、计算机A等优势学科实力突出，结合2026年扩招带来的 机会，值得考生重点关注。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Northeastern University in Qinghai Province for Science/Physics Category were approximately 2220, 2436, 2193, 2017, and 2311 respectively. The ranking fluctuation range over the past five years is between 2017 and 2436, showing an overall oscillating pattern with no clear unilateral trend; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 2311. The enrollment plan for Northeastern University in Qinghai Province for Science/Physics Category: 13 students each year from 2021 to 2024, increased to 15 in 2025, and further expanded to 20 in 2026, an increase of about 33.3% compared to 2025, a significant expansion that has an important impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 38th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable rankings in the 36–39 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering institutions; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving the naming controversy of the Qinhuangdao campus, with no major negative public opinion; in 2025, there was an internship safety accident (somewhat negative), but it was an isolated incident; Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd (average), with low exposure on short video platforms, and overall application attention is stable; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Control Science and Engineering was rated A+, Computer Science and Technology and Metallurgical Engineering were rated A, and Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other majors are highly recommended directions for 2026, aligning with Northeastern University's engineering strengths; Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing, Civil Engineering, etc., show a differentiated wait-and-see attitude. The total number of candidates registered for the 2026 Qinghai Province college entrance examination is approximately 48,000, a slight increase from 2025, with an estimated 30,720 Physics Category candidates, leading to a slight intensification of competition; Northeastern University is located in Shenyang, Liaoning, and its enrollment proportion in Qinghai Province is very small (about 0.42% in 2025), making it a long-distance cross-province application; the university has no local enrollment preference in Qinghai Province, so candidates need to weigh their own regional preferences; majors such as Computer, Mechanical, and Artificial Intelligence are highly matched with the university's advantageous disciplines, exerting strong appeal to candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 2311 in 2025, the significant enrollment expansion of 33.3% in 2026 (15 to 20 students), a slight increase of about 0.86% in the total number of candidates in Qinghai Province, and a neutral and stable school reputation: the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, theoretically intensifying competition (ranking number increases), but the neutral reputation and the increase in enrollment slots due to expansion have a moderating effect on rankings. After comprehensive consideration, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 2723, with a range of 2315–3131.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Computer Science and Technology
- Artificial Intelligence (Zhiying Talent Class)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Mechanical Class (including Mechanical Engineering, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Vehicle Engineering, Industrial Design)
- Engineering Experimental Class (1) (including Metallurgical Engineering, Environmental Science, Resource Recycling Science and Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Engineering Experimental Class (2) (including Mineral Processing Engineering, Surveying and Mapping Engineering, Resource Exploration Engineering, Environmental Engineering, Safety Engineering, Civil Engineering)
- Applied Physics
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is approximately 2723, with a range of 2315–3131. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (around 2315) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors such as Computer Science and Technology and Artificial Intelligence; those with rankings in the middle of the range (around 2700) should primarily choose Tier 2 majors like Mechanical Class and Engineering Experimental Class (1); candidates with rankings at the upper end of the range (around 3100) are advised to use Tier 3 majors as a safety net. Northeastern University's A+ in Control Science and Engineering, A in Computer Science, and other strong disciplines, combined with the opportunities brought by the 2026 enrollment expansion, make it worthy of candidates' attention.
